entities.name: SORGOLOEONE
entities.description: A secondary sorghum metabolite released from roots with allelopathic properties that inhibits nitrification

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its ability to release sorgoleone to inhibit soil nitrification

entities.name: AMMONIA-OXIDIZING ARCHAEA
entities.description: Soil microorganisms that perform the rate-limiting step of ammonia oxidation in nitrification

entities.name: AMMONIA-OXIDIZING BACTERIA
entities.description: Soil microorganisms that perform the rate-limiting step of ammonia oxidation in nitrification

entities.name: AMMONIA OXIDATION
entities.description: The biochemical process of converting ammonia to nitrite, serving as the rate-limiting step in nitrification

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonia to nitrate in the soil

entities.name: DENITRIFICATION
entities.description: The microbial process of reducing nitrate to nitrogen gases, leading to nitrogen loss

entities.name: NO3- LEACHING
entities.description: The process of nitrate moving through the soil profile, leading to nitrogen loss

entities.name: POTENTIAL NITRIFICATION RATE
entities.description: A measure of the maximum rate at which nitrification can occur in a soil sample

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITRIFICATION INHIBITION
entities.description: The process by which plants release compounds to slow down the conversion of ammonium to nitrate

entities.name: GREENHOUSE PIPE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: An experimental setup used to evaluate the effect of different sorghum lines on nitrification and microbial communities

entities.name: IS20205
entities.description: A sorghum line characterized by a high ability to release sorgoleone

entities.name: IS32234
entities.description: A sorghum line characterized by a medium ability to release sorgoleone

entities.name: 296B
entities.description: A sorghum line characterized by a low ability to release sorgoleone

entities.name: AMMONIUM SULFATE
entities.description: A nitrogen-based fertilizer applied to the soil in the greenhouse experiment

entities.name: PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil, which influences microbial community composition

entities.name: NITRATE
entities.description: An inorganic nitrogen compound produced during nitrification and a factor affecting microbial communities

entities.name: NO2
entities.description: Nitrite, an intermediate product of nitrification measured in the soil

entities.name: MINERAL N
entities.description: The sum of inorganic nitrogen forms in the soil

entities.name: TOTAL N
entities.description: The total amount of all nitrogen forms present in the soil

entities.name: TOTAL C
entities.description: The total amount of carbon present in the soil

entities.name: TOTAL BACTERIA
entities.description: The overall population of bacteria in the rhizosphere and bulk soil

entities.name: ARCHAEA
entities.description: The overall population of archaea in the rhizosphere and bulk soil

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water in the soil, acting as an environmental factor shaping microbial communities

entities.name: NH4+-N
entities.description: Ammonium nitrogen, a substrate for nitrification and a factor shaping microbial communities

entities.name: MULTIVARIATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the composition of microbial communities

entities.name: SPEARMAN'S CORRELATIONS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the strength and direction of relationships between variables
